# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.
# Category: datastore_security

redis_cluster/main.yml:
   version: '3'
   
   services:
      master1: &master
         image: redis:latest # replace this with your Redis Image, e.g., "bitnami" for bitnami/redis-server docker container or other available in DockerHub like mysql etc.. 
       environment:   
          - REDIS_CLUSTER_SLAVE=master1      # This will be replaced by the Redis Cluster master service at runtime.    
         ports:  
           - "6379"       
           
      slave1: &slave 
         image : redis:latest    # replace this with your required version of docker container, e., bitnami or other available in DockerHub like mysql etc..         
       environment:    
         REDIS_CLUSTER_MASTER=master1   # This will be replaced by the Redis Cluster master service at runtime.       
           ports :  "6380"     
           
    replicas:                                                       # Create two instances of redis container with different names and roles for cluster purposes      
         num_masters: '1'               // Number Of Masters In Your Set            
         master1,master2                /// Names For The Instances                  
         ~slave                          // Use A Docker Compose File To Define Slices                   
     replicas.num_replicas : 0                     # Ensure Writes Fail Safely If Slaves Are Down     
       numReplicas: '2'                     
         slave1,slave2                   /// Names For The Instances                 
         ~master                         // Use A Docker Compose File To Define Slices                   
     min-slaves-to-write : 0                     # Enable Writes Without Authentication If Slaves Are Down     
       minSlavesToWrite: '1'
